product: Databricks Data Classification is now GA
tagline: Databricks Data Classification is now generally available.
what_it_does: Databricks Data Classification is now generally available. Use Data Classification to automatically classify and tag sensitive data in Unity Catalog using an agentic AI system. This page describes how to use Databricks Data Classification in Unity Catalog to automatically classify and tag sensitive data in your catalog.
why_it_matters: It is critical for data teams to understand what kind of sensitive data exists in each table so that they can both govern and democratize access to this data.
plain_summary: Databricks Data Classification is now generally available. Use Data Classification to automatically classify and tag sensitive data in Unity Catalog using an agentic AI system.
key_takeaway: Databricks Data Classification is now generally available.
